pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in task.json and setup_task.sh as the destination file.
CAMEO Chemicals (ID 8744). General Description: 'shipped as a liquefied gas'. Fire Hazard: 'EXTREMELY FLAMMABLE'. Logic: Liquefied Gas + Flammable = TIER_1.
CAMEO Chemicals (ID 1692). General Description: 'Shipped as a liquefied gas'. Fire Hazard: 'Easily ignited' / NFPA Flammability 4. Logic: Liquefied Gas + Flammable = TIER_1.
CAMEO Chemicals (ID 4654). General Description: 'A clear colorless liquid'. Fire Hazard: 'Flash point 40F' / NFPA Flammability 3. Logic: Liquid = TIER_3.

CAMEO Chemicals (ID 1554). General Description: 'A colorless gas... Boiling point -10C' / Synonyms: 'SULFUR DIOXIDE, LIQUEFIED'. Fire Hazard: NFPA Flammability 0 ('Will not burn'). Logic: Liquefied Gas + Non-Flammable = TIER_2.
CAMEO Chemicals (ID 3043). General Description: 'A clear colorless liquid'. Fire Hazard: 'HIGHLY FLAMMABLE' / NFPA Flammability 3. Logic: Liquid = TIER_3.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real chemical data from the NOAA CAMEO Chemicals database. Based on the chemical properties found on the site (boiling point, flash point, NFPA 704 ratings, and ERG guides), the 5 chemicals correctly map to the assigned states and flammability parameters according to the task's logic. Isobutane (CAS 75-28-5) and Vinyl Chloride (CAS 75-01-4) are both highly flammable liquefied gases (TIER_1). Toluene (CAS 108-88-3) and Cyclohexane (CAS 110-82-7) are flammable liquids (TIER_3). Sulfur Dioxide (CAS 7446-09-5) is a toxic, non-flammable liquefied gas (TIER_2). The target output path /home/ga/Documents/bleve_risk_assessment.csv and expected headers match the verification logic.
